description_long: This is a futuristic, low-profile sports car with a sleek, aerodynamic body finished in a glossy white color. The car features a prominent rear wing spoiler, large side air intakes, and a single-seat cockpit with visible orange and black interior accents. The front end is sharply contoured with a bold number '8' displayed on the hood, and the headlights are integrated into the streamlined fenders. The side profile reveals angular body panels, flush-mounted details, and a compact, open cockpit design. At the rear, the car has a wide stance, a central exhaust, and a digital display panel, emphasizing its high-performance character. The overall design suggests advanced materials and engineering, suitable for high-speed urban or track environments.
description: A futuristic, single-seat sports car with a glossy white finish, bold number '8', and a prominent rear wing spoiler. Features include angular bodywork, large air intakes, and orange-black interior accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold number '8' on the hood, integrated headlights, and the open cockpit with orange-black seat details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular body panels, large side air intake, and the rear wing spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide stance, central exhaust, digital display panel, and the full width of the rear wing.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit opening, side air intake, and the car's low, aerodynamic profile.
